clipboard_investigation_2026_04_02.status: COMPLETE PICTURE — zero new dependencies needed. objc2-app-kit already in motif_core with features=["NSView","NSWindow"]; add NSPasteboard feature. Create motif_core::clipboard with read()->Option<String> and write(text:&str) using NSPasteboard::generalPasteboard(). Both playground.rs:917-925 and todomvc.rs:480-484 have // TODO: Clipboard stubs. HandleKeyResult::Copy(String)/Cut(String)/Paste already defined. TextEditState::paste(&str) and cut_selected_text() already implemented. ~20 lines total. Strong candidate for next PR when backlog clears.

accesskit_integration_2026_03_26.status: COMPLETE PICTURE — all data structures implemented, wiring plan finalized. App struct needs 3 fields: access_tree: AccessTree, focus_mgr: FocusManager, access_context: Option<accesskit_winit::AccessKitWinitContext>. resumed(): init context after window creation with initial TreeUpdate from access_tree.build_initial_update(). window_event(): on each frame, call adapter.update_if_active(|| build_update()); on focus changes call adapter directly. Elements push AccessNode during draw with bounds set. ~30 lines total across examples. accesskit_winit = '0.32' already in Cargo.toml — zero new deps needed.

animation_primitives_2026_03_26.status: DESIGN COMPLETE — no animation code exists. Simplest: struct Animation { start: Instant, duration: Duration } with .progress() -> f32 { (elapsed / duration).clamp(0,1) }. Color lerp via palette (already in workspace). Easing as pure functions (cubic, quad, sine — no deps). No new deps needed. Deferred until PR backlog clears.
animation_primitives_2026_03_26.design_notes: Immediate-mode framework is ideal for this: store Instant when animation starts, compute elapsed on each render, use progress to interpolate values, call request_redraw() to keep animating. State lives in app/element struct, not in core.

Has 'type Surface' associated type and 'fn render(&mut self, scene: &Scene, surface: &mut Self::Surface)'. MetalRenderer implements it with Surface = MetalSurface. DebugRenderer implements it with Surface = (). 'Abstract renderer trait' TODO in cross-platform section is COMPLETE. Remaining cross-platform work is wgpu backend: research wgpu surface/device API to see how it fits the Renderer trait interface.
